candidate_type: local native parser and Composer library combination
provider_or_runtime: PHP 8.2.12 CLI through XAMPP on Windows
model_or_library: Native PHP file I/O; ZipArchive and DOM/XML parsing; smalot/pdfparser v2.12.5
configuration_summary: TXT uses native PHP reading; DOCX and PPTX use local ZIP/XML parsing; PDF uses smalot/pdfparser. All extraction runs locally with no AI provider call.
reason_for_inclusion: Small, PHP-oriented first candidate that matches the preferred stack and can be tested without a second runtime or external service.
license_or_terms_reference: PHP License for PHP runtime; LGPL-3.0-only for smalot/pdfparser; dependency licenses remain subject to installed package metadata.
hardware_requirements: Current feasibility baseline laptop; CPU and RAM only; no GPU required.
php_integration_notes: Direct CLI integration is simple. Browser integration would require Apache to use the same enabled ZIP extension and must retain protected-file access checks.
external_dependency: Composer package download is required during setup; no external runtime service or fixture transmission is required.
notes: Registration records the measured setup only. It does not select a final extraction architecture or approve the candidate for implementation.
